data.title: 国际服主线关卡开放：Area20
data.summary: [New Mission Available Notice] Check out Mission Area 20 in the 3/28 (Tue) update. You can earn new
data.body:
[New Mission Available Notice]

Check out Mission Area 20 in the 3/28 (Tue) update. You can earn new T7 Equipment Blueprints from Normal Missions and Serina, Hare, and Iori's Elephs from Hard Missions!

#BlueArchive![XAIVjjSB93ZeEP4oXYvXp2VxRLr9A6bB.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/XAIVjjSB93ZeEP4oXYvXp2VxRLr9A6bB.jpg)
